title: Minimum Number of Steps to Make Two Strings Anagram II
titleCn: 制造字母异位词的最小步骤数 II

testcases.input: s = "leetcode", t = "coats" Output: 7 Explanation: - In 2 steps, we can append the letters in "as" onto s = "leetcode", forming s = "leetcodeas". - In 5 steps, we can append the letters in "leede" onto t = "coats", forming t = "coatsleede". "leetcodeas" and "coatsleede" are now anagrams of each other. We used a total of 2 + 5 = 7 steps. It can be shown that there is no way to make them anagrams of each other with less than 7 steps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: - In 2 steps, we can append the letters in "as" onto s = "leetcode", forming s = "leetcodeas". - In 5 steps, we can append the letters in "leede" onto t = "coats", forming t = "coatsleede". "leetcodeas" and "coatsleede" are now anagrams of each other. We used a total of 2 + 5 = 7 steps. It can be shown that there is no way to make them anagrams of each other with less than 7 steps.

testcases.input: s = "night", t = "thing" Output: 0 Explanation: The given strings are already anagrams of each other. Thus, we do not need any further steps.
